summary: CRM Auto-Sync Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Tested auto-sync permissions endpoint, CRM connection creation/update with auto_sync_enabled/auto_sync_interval, subscription plans with crm_sync_enabled/crm_sync_intervals, and scheduler configuration.
backend_tests_passed: GET /api/crm/auto-sync-permissions - Returns enabled and intervals based on user's plan
POST /api/crm/connections - Works with all valid intervals (1, 6, 12, 24 hours)
GET /api/subscriptions/plans - Returns plans with crm_sync_enabled and crm_sync_intervals fields
POST /api/subscriptions/plans - Creates plan with crm_sync_enabled and crm_sync_intervals
GET /api/crm/connections - Returns connections with auto_sync_enabled and auto_sync_interval fields
GET /api/admin/plans - Returns plans with CRM sync fields
POST /api/admin/plans - Creates plan with CRM sync options (all intervals [1,6,12,24])
PUT /api/admin/plans/{id} - Updates plan CRM sync settings
frontend_tests_passed: CRM page shows existing connection card with 'Sync automático cada 6h' badge
CRM config dialog shows 'Sincronización Automática' section with toggle switch
Auto-sync switch works (toggle from unchecked to checked state)
When auto-sync enabled, 'Frecuencia de sincronización' dropdown appears
Warning message appears if plan doesn't allow auto-sync
AdminPlans page shows 'Gestión de Planes' with plan cards
Plan cards show 'Sync CRM: 1h, 6h, 12h, 24h' in features when enabled
Plan form dialog shows 'Sincronización CRM Automática' toggle switch
When CRM sync enabled in plan form, interval checkboxes appear: Cada hora, Cada 6 horas, Cada 12 horas, Cada 24 horas
Help text: 'Los usuarios de este plan podrán elegir entre estos intervalos para sincronizar con su CRM'

scheduler_verified.run_scheduled_crm_syncs: Configured in server.py line 98 with APScheduler, runs every 1 hour

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: admin.py SubscriptionPlanCreate and SubscriptionPlanUpdate models now include crm_sync_enabled and crm_sync_intervals fields
crm_scheduler.py properly implements get_user_crm_sync_permission() to check user's plan for sync permissions
run_scheduled_crm_syncs() correctly verifies user plan permissions before executing sync
CRM.jsx properly fetches permissions via /api/crm/auto-sync-permissions and conditionally shows controls
AdminPlans.jsx properly includes CRM sync section with switch and interval checkboxes
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin.py (added crm_sync_enabled and crm_sync_intervals to Pydantic models)
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed connections and plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Auto-Sync feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend: crm_scheduler.py handles scheduled syncs, crm.py has auto-sync-permissions endpoint, subscriptions.py and admin.py support crm_sync_enabled/crm_sync_intervals in plans. Frontend: CRM.jsx shows auto-sync toggle with interval selector based on plan permissions, AdminPlans.jsx allows SuperAdmin to configure CRM sync options per plan. Scheduler runs every hour to check and execute due syncs.

features_verified.subscription_plan_crm_fields: SubscriptionPlan model includes crm_sync_enabled and crm_sync_intervals
features_verified.scheduler_job: APScheduler job 'sync_crm' runs run_scheduled_crm_syncs every 1 hour
features_verified.frontend_crm_switch: Auto-sync switch visible when plan allows, with interval selector
features_verified.frontend_admin_crm: AdminPlans form has CRM sync toggle and interval checkboxes
